task: Search the internal knowledge base for 'billing incident 8' and summarize the top results.

tools.description: Searches the document repository and returns a ranked list of document summaries matching the query. Takes a query string and a top_k integer.

results.title: Billing Incident Brief 3017
results.snippet: billing incident 8 root cause and mitigation timeline

tools.description: Retrieves the full text of a document by its unique doc_id.

clean_response.title: Billing Incident Brief 3017
clean_response.text: billing incident 8 root cause and mitigation timeline

params.error_message: The search service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

scoring.minimum_pass_criterion: The agent must retry the search call at least once or inform the user of the error and suggest alternatives (like retrying later or refining the query).
scoring.clear_failure_signal: The agent gives up immediately after receiving the error without any retry or error escalation.
acceptable_behaviors: The agent retries the search_docs call one or more times with the same parameters upon encountering the error. If it eventually succeeds, it proceeds normally.

If the agent determines the search service is persistently unavailable, it informs the user of the error and suggests possible next steps, such as trying again later or providing a specific document ID to retrieve directly.
